compiled_state.title: Implement gate-escalation-router.py
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/gate-escalation-router.py. The script:
- Reads JSON array of gate signals from stdin (conforming to gate-signal-schema)
- Accepts: --complex flag (from complexity evaluator)
- Counts primary signals: signal_type=="primary" AND triggered==true
- Collects modifier annotations: signal_type=="modifier" AND triggered==true -> extract evidence
- Routing:
  - --complex -> {"route":"escalate","reason":"COMPLEX classification",...}
  - 0 primary -> {"route":"auto-fix","signal_count":0,...}
  - 1 primary -> {"route":"dialog","signal_count":1,"question_count":2,"dialog_context":{signal + modifier annotations},...}
  - 2+ primary -> {"route":"escalate","signal_count":N,"signals":[...all evidence...],...}
- Missing gates (partial array) -> count only present, default 0
- Exits 0 always. Python stdlib only (json, sys).

TDD: GREEN -- implement until Task 1 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/gate-escalation-router.py
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/scripts/test_gate_escalation_router.py -q
- [ ] Routes zero signals to auto-fix
  Verify: echo '[]' | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/gate-escalation-router.py | python3 -c "import json,sys; assert json.load(sys.stdin)['route']=='auto-fix'"
- [ ] ruff check
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/gate-escalation-router.py

comments.body:
AC amendment (review): (1) question_count should be dynamic 1-2 based on signal context, not hardcoded 2. Use 1 when the single signal has high confidence, 2 otherwise. (2) Modifier annotations use the 'evidence' field from gate-signal-schema.md — NOT 'annotation'. The dialog_context collects evidence strings from modifier signals. (3) Add AC verify commands for dialog and escalate routes:
- Dialog route: echo '[{"gate_id":"1b","triggered":true,"signal_type":"primary","evidence":"test","confidence":"high"}]' | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/gate-escalation-router.py | python3 -c "import json,sys; assert json.load(sys.stdin)['route']=='dialog'"
- Escalate route: echo '[{"gate_id":"1b","triggered":true,"signal_type":"primary","evidence":"a","confidence":"high"},{"gate_id":"2a","triggered":true,"signal_type":"primary","evidence":"b","confidence":"high"}]' | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/gate-escalation-router.py | python3 -c "import json,sys; assert json.load(sys.stdin)['route']=='escalate'"
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: RED tests confirmed (script not yet created) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
